notes: Milestone 6 issue #21 verified dataset for component identity, connector names, cable dependencies, airflow roles, build sequence, and BIOS training states.
Exact interactive x/y coordinates remain future digital twin work and are deliberately marked partially verified or deferred where appropriate.

components.name: AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D
components.role: AM5 gaming CPU installed in the motherboard socket.

sources.note: Primary component list identifies the exact CPU and AM5 compatibility.

components.name: ARCTIC Liquid Freezer III Pro 360
components.role: 360mm AIO liquid cooler mounted in the top radiator position.

sources.note: AIO AM5 support, radiator dimensions, top-radiator compatibility, and acceptable cable paths are verified.

components.name: Gigabyte B850 AORUS Elite WiFi7
components.role: Central AM5 motherboard for CPU, memory, SSD, GPU, headers, and power connections.

sources.note: Motherboard connector/header inventory is verified for the static guide.

components.name: G.SKILL Flare X5 32GB DDR5-6000 CL30
components.role: Two-module AMD EXPO DDR5 kit installed in slots DDR5_A2 and DDR5_B2.

sources.note: G.SKILL QVL lists the motherboard for this kit and the manual verifies A2/B2 slot guidance.

components.name: Samsung 990 EVO Plus 2TB NVMe SSD
components.role: M.2 2280 NVMe boot SSD installed in the preferred CPU-connected M2A_CPU slot.

sources.note: M2A_CPU is verified as the preferred CPU-connected M.2 slot for the boot NVMe SSD.

components.name: Gigabyte Radeon RX 9060 XT Gaming OC 16GB
components.role: Primary graphics card installed in the motherboard primary PCIe x16 slot.

sources.note: Compatibility summary verifies GPU length, PCIe slot fit, and PSU capacity.

components.name: Lian Li O11 Dynamic Mini V2 Flow
components.role: Case, airflow frame, radiator mount, and cable-routing enclosure.

sources.note: Case fan count, ATX support, GPU clearance, PSU clearance, and top radiator support are verified for the static guide.

components.name: ASUS TUF Gaming 1000W Gold
components.role: Fully modular ATX power supply for motherboard, CPU, GPU, and optional accessory power.

sources.note: Compatibility summary verifies case clearance and power headroom.

components.name: Windows 11 Pro
components.role: Operating system installed from an existing Windows 11 Pro USB installer.

sources.note: Project assumptions state Windows 11 Pro installation media is already available on USB.

locations.staticFallback: Area used for CPU EPS routing before top radiator final installation.

sources.note: Connector identity is verified; exact digital twin coordinates remain pending.

locations.staticFallback: Right-edge cable entry zone for ATX 24-pin and front USB routing.

locations.staticFallback: Bottom-edge zone for front-panel, front-audio, and lower utility leads.

sources.note: F_PANEL labels and polarity caution are verified; exact rendered map remains future work.

locations.label: CPU fan and pump header area
locations.staticFallback: Header area used for the simple AIO all-in-one cable or optional individual-control leads.

sources.note: Acceptable headers are verified; exact x/y placement is future digital twin work.

locations.label: DDR5_A2 and DDR5_B2 memory slots

locations.label: M2A_CPU NVMe slot
locations.staticFallback: Preferred CPU-connected M.2 slot for the Samsung boot SSD.

locations.label: Primary PCIe x16 slot
locations.staticFallback: Install the graphics card in the primary PCIe x16 slot.

sources.note: Primary PCIe x16 slot usage is verified for the static guide.

locations.staticFallback: Area occupied by the installed GPU and its PCIe power cable.

sources.note: GPU installation guidance is documented; exact visual position remains future work.
AIO and case top-radiator fit is verified as compatible and clearance-sensitive.

locations.label: Bottom intake fan row
locations.staticFallback: Three bottom intake fans feed cool air toward the GPU and motherboard.

sources.note: Planned layout is documented as three bottom intake fans.

locations.label: Side intake fan column
locations.staticFallback: Two side intake fans supply fresh air into the main chamber.

sources.note: Planned layout is documented as two side intake fans.

locations.label: Rear cable-management chamber
locations.staticFallback: Rear chamber for PSU modular cables and slack management before panel closure.

sources.note: Routing rules are documented; exact cable paths remain physical-build verified.

locations.staticFallback: PSU output side for modular ATX, EPS, PCIe, and optional SATA power cables.

sources.note: PSU cable types are documented; exact modular panel positions remain future work.

connectors.label: PSU optional SATA power modular output

sources.ref: Baseline build leaves SATA power unused unless a future accessory requires it.

cables.label: 24-pin ATX motherboard power cable
dependencyNotes: Confirm the latch is fully seated before closing the rear panel.

sources.note: Cable type and routing dependency are documented; exact route coordinates are future work.

cables.label: CPU EPS power cable
dependencyNotes: Route before top radiator final installation.
Keep separate from PCIe GPU power cables.

sources.note: Routing dependency is documented; exact route coordinates are pending.

cables.label: PCIe 8-pin GPU power cable
dependencyNotes: Connect only after the GPU is fully latched in the PCIe slot.
Avoid sharp bends at the GPU connector.

sources.note: Cable type and handling rule are documented; exact route coordinates are future work.

cables.label: Case front-panel switch and LED leads
dependencyNotes: LED leads are polarity-sensitive and must follow the motherboard pin labels.

sources.note: Front-panel labels and LED polarity caution are verified; exact cable coordinate is future work.
Header and handling rule are verified; exact cable coordinate is future work.

cables.label: Front USB-C internal cable
dependencyNotes: Avoid side load on the connector.

sources.note: Header and routing dependency are verified; exact cable coordinate is future work.

cables.label: Front HD audio cable
dependencyNotes: Route away from fans and high-tension power bundles.

sources.note: Header and routing guidance are verified; exact cable coordinate is future work.

cables.label: ARCTIC AIO all-in-one control cable
dependencyNotes: Use this simple build path unless deliberately choosing individual pump, VRM fan, and radiator fan control.
Set the connected header to PWM in BIOS.

sources.note: ARCTIC and Gigabyte documentation verify this as an acceptable simple control path.

cables.label: Optional SATA power cable
dependencyNotes: Leave unused during baseline setup unless a future documented accessory requires it.

sources.ref: No baseline SATA-powered accessory is currently part of this build.

airflow.label: Bottom intake airflow
airflow.staticFallback: Three bottom intake fans feed cool air toward the GPU and motherboard.

sources.note: Planned layout is documented as three bottom intake fans.

airflow.label: Side intake airflow
airflow.staticFallback: Two side intake fans supply fresh air into the main chamber.

sources.note: Planned layout is documented as two side intake fans.

airflow.label: Top 360mm radiator exhaust
airflow.staticFallback: The top radiator is planned as exhaust, with bottom and side fans acting as intake.

sources.note: Planned airflow role is verified for the static guide and final fan direction remains a physical check.

buildSequence.label: Install DDR5 in A2 and B2

sources.note: A2/B2 slot guidance is verified.
M2A_CPU is verified as the preferred boot SSD slot.
Top 360mm radiator fit and cable path are verified as compatible and clearance-sensitive.
Q-Flash behavior is verified; exact menu names may vary by firmware version.
Windows 11 Pro USB installation media is a project assumption.
EXPO support is verified; exact BIOS menu path remains firmware-version dependent.
Benchmark procedure is verified; real scores are intentionally not invented.

biosTraining.label: Default boot before EXPO
biosTraining.staticFallback: Boot at defaults before enabling EXPO or tuning.

biosTraining.label: USB installer boot order
biosTraining.staticFallback: Use the Windows 11 Pro USB installer for OS installation, then boot from the NVMe SSD after installation.

sources.note: USB installation media is assumed; exact BIOS menu path depends on firmware version.

biosTraining.label: NVMe boot after Windows installation
biosTraining.staticFallback: After Windows is installed, remove or de-prioritise the USB installer so the Samsung NVMe SSD boots first.

sources.note: Boot behavior is documented; exact BIOS menu path depends on firmware version.

biosTraining.label: Stable defaults with EXPO disabled
biosTraining.staticFallback: Confirm the system is stable at default memory settings before enabling EXPO.

biosTraining.label: EXPO memory training
biosTraining.staticFallback: After EXPO is enabled, DDR5 memory training can take several minutes.

biosTraining.label: EXPO enabled and verified
biosTraining.staticFallback: After training completes, verify the memory profile in BIOS or Windows and record the stable baseline.

sources.note: EXPO support is verified; exact menu names remain firmware-version dependent.

biosTraining.label: Clear CMOS rollback
biosTraining.staticFallback: If EXPO training repeatedly fails, return to safe defaults before continuing troubleshooting.

sources.note: Rollback guidance is documented; exact board procedure should be checked against the installed board/manual before interactive training is finalized.
QVL compatibility is verified.
